name: Edge AI Compute per Dollar
description: Peak AI inference performance in tera operations per second per dollar (TOPS/$) for edge/mobile AI accelerators. Tracks chips like Google Edge TPU, Apple Neural Engine, Qualcomm Hexagon, NVIDIA Jetson series.

data_points.source: NVIDIA Jetson TX1 — 1 TOPS for ~$300 module = 0.003 TOPS/$
Google Edge TPU / Coral — 4 TOPS for ~$75 dev board; NVIDIA Jetson Nano approaching; Intel Movidius
NVIDIA Jetson Nano — 0.5 TFLOPS FP16 for $99; Coral USB Accelerator 4 TOPS for $60
NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX — 21 TOPS for $199 module = 0.1 TOPS/$
NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano — 40 TOPS for $199 = 0.2 TOPS/$; Orin NX 100 TOPS for $399
Hailo-8L — 13 TOPS for ~$30; various edge NPUs in phones (Snapdragon 8 Gen 3: 45 TOPS built-in to $500 phones)
NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano Super — 67 TOPS for $249 = 0.27 TOPS/$; Hailo-10H 40 TOPS for ~$50; phone NPUs reaching 45+ TOPS in $300 devices (approx best available)
